title: Egg-Like Totem
description: Totem of undying with a big nose like the new spawn eggs for the villager family!
body:
# Egg-Like Totem
This is an extremely simple texture pack that I made since the new villager spawn egg is so funny. There's not really much left to say.

Should work in any version of the game.

# Preview
![Screenshot of a totem being activated in game. The totem has a really big nose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e5341bcb18ac561d86d69c3b97ad046cb9e7d66.png)
